creator: janm@transactionware.com
text:
Attached is now a capture from a successful connect to Windows 7 under VMware. The biggest difference I see is that there are two requests that Wireshark can't fully decode:

Request:
0000   1b 00 08 f0 6a e3 ff ff ff ff 00 00 00 00 2a 00
0010   00 01 00 03 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00

Response:
0000   1b 00 08 f0 6a e3 ff ff ff ff 00 0e 00 c0 2a 00
0010   01 01 00 03 00 00 ff 00 00 00 00

There could easily be something else I'm missing. This trace doesn't seem to capture the hub traffic, so I don't know if something else is happening there.

Incidentally, a Linux VM on the same system has the same problem as FreeBSD, with a five second interface instead of a three second interval.
